listings.description:
Large room. Highly convenient location - walking distance to popular eateries, public transportation (LRT, busses) and sport complex - all within 5 mins. 
Utilities shared. 
Only male as rest of tenants are all male. 
Easy access to major highways (NPE, kesas, LDP, Elite). Shopping such as Sunway pyramid, subang parade, Damen, empire gallery, summit - within 5 mins drive. 

Joint tenants with local working adults. Shared use of common facilities - cooking, fridge, washing machine, large hall downstairs etc. House facing field - plenty of parking available.
